title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
